$schema.description: URL to the schema for this configuration file.

root.description: The root directory for the local project memory.

cloud.description: Configuration for the TekMemo Cloud API.

baseUrl.description: The base URL for the cloud API.

recall.description: Local recall engine configuration for local and hybrid modes. Controls whether memory is retrieved by lexical match (BM25 + fuzzy, zero config), semantic embeddings, or a merged hybrid of both. In local mode, recall defaults to lexical-only unless an embedder is configured or local embeddings are enabled.

engine.description: Retrieval strategy. "lexical" = BM25 + fuzzy only (no embedder, zero config). "vector" = semantic embeddings only (requires an embedder). "hybrid" = both paths merged and reranked (requires an embedder). "auto" (default) = "hybrid" when an embedder is available, else "lexical".

localEmbeddings.description: When true, lazy-load a local ONNX embedder (via @tekbreed/tekmemo-adapter-transformers) so hybrid recall works with no API keys. The model is only loaded on the first recall. Disable to keep the runtime import-light. Defaults to false in the core runtime; the MCP server may default this on.

embeddingModel.description: Transformers.js-compatible local embedding model id. Only used when local embeddings are enabled. Defaults to "Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2".
